label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 17

extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz attacked 60km out on penultimate climb with Bernal, dropped everyone including his former companion, won by massive margin with Sepcuss taking second.
tactical_patterns: Bernal initiated 60km attack forcing Roglic's hand; only two-rider alliance shows GC field lacked depth or conviction to counter.
Jumbo-Visma positioning Sepcuss for second denied bonus seconds to rivals despite Roglic winning comfortably, revealing meticulous margin management.
Bahrain Victorious chased hard for Caruso/breakaway despite having no GC threat, suggesting stage-hunting priority over supporting potential podium moves.
Lopez and Mas engaged chase but couldn't distance each other, exposing mutual weakness rather than GC threat to Roglic.

rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: positive: initiated 60km solo attack and held separation until final climb, indicating return to elite climbing form for Bahrain
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: followed Bernal's 60km attack then dropped him decisively, winning by multiple minutes with teammate second shows total dominance
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: negative: crashed in rain and lost 9+ minutes after struggling before descent, completely overextended in GC position
rider_signals.SEPCUSS Wout: positive: delivered perfect domestique performance taking second place to deny bonus seconds to Lopez/Mas/Yates on mountain stage
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: negative: couldn't drop Mas or Yates despite fresh Movistar support on ideal high-mountain finish
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: failed to attack despite being 2:22 down with only one mountain stage remaining after this one
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: finished with Lopez/Mas group ahead of Bernal despite being considered inferior pure climber
